articles.title: World Cup Spurred 2.8 Million Sign-Ups To Fox One Streamer, June Data Reveals
articles.summary: The World Cup, which smashed records for viewing during its just-concluded five-week run, provided a significant boost to fledgling streaming outlet Fox One. According to data for June released Tuesday by research firm Antenna, 2.8 million subscribers signed up for the service during the month, including 400,000 on the tournament’s opening day on June 11.
